facebook.content: "My dear brothers and sisters in Christ, I want to remind you that the battle for surrender and faith is an ongoing one. We will face trials that test our resolve and our trust in God. But let me tell you this: the God who walked with the Israelites through the Red Sea is the same God who walks with you today. He is faithful, and He will see you through the darkest of nights. So, I charge you: stand firm in your faith, and watch the Lord work wonders in your life.
facebook.cta:
Learn more about our mission
https://increasingfaith.net/about.html
facebook.fullPost:
"My dear brothers and sisters in Christ, I want to remind you that the battle for surrender and faith is an ongoing one. We will face trials that test our resolve and our trust in God. But let me tell you this: the God who walked with the Israelites through the Red Sea is the same God who walks with you today. He is faithful, and He will see you through the darkest of nights. So, I charge you: stand firm in your faith, and watch the Lord work wonders in your life.

Learn more about our mission
https://increasingfaith.net/about.html

#KingdomOfGod #IncreasingFaith #Jesus

instagram.content:
You are not broken, you are being refined.

Just as gold is tested in fire to remove its impurities, God is working to purify your heart, stripping away what's holding you back.

Do not despise the process, it's a mark of His love and desire for intimacy with you.

Will you trust Him in the fire, knowing He is working a masterpiece in you?
instagram.cta: Learn more about our mission → Link in bio
